headline: Crown Castle (CCI) Soars 5.8%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
summary: Crown Castle (CCI) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in FFO estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
